description: The ReferenceDriveReceiver component is used to allow dropping a reference proxy via the user's hand onto a UIX element to trigger the prompt for driving a reference field. This requires a UIX button to work.

fields.Reference: The field this should allow an option to drive for when a reference is dropped onto the UIX element this is on.

usage: Attach to a slot as part of a Canvas hierarchy with a Button in the same slot. Provide a value for ``Reference`` for it to start working.
